Product Tabs

Description

How to

Gyeon Q²M Tire Express is the ultimate daily tyre & rubber dressing offering fantastic looks matched with a simple, straightforward application. It will restore the factory fresh look of the tyre and keep it for many a hundred miles.

## Product Features and Benefits

- Cleans and protects tires in one easy step

- Safe for use on all types of tires, including white walls

- Non-acidic formula will not damage or harm tires

- Leaves a glossy and hydrophobic finish on tires

- Helps to prevent tire blooming and discoloration

- Fast and easy application

Being water based, it extremely easy to apply and allows both a dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn't require rubbing into the surface like our SiO2 infused Q² Tire.

Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self-cleaning layer that helps to keep the tyre clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

**Consumption****:** 10-15ml/ set
**Durability****:** >2 washes

## Step 1: Clean the Tires

Before using Gyeon Q2M Tire Express, make sure your tires are clean and free of dirt and grime. You can use a tire cleaner, such as Gyeon Q2M Tire Cleaner, to clean your tires before applying the tire dressing.

## Step 2: Apply Gyeon Q2M Tire Express

Shake the bottle well before use. Apply Gyeon Q2M Tire Express directly onto the tire surface, using a foam applicator pad or a microfiber towel. Be sure to cover the entire surface of the tire, including the sidewalls and any grooves or crevices.

## Step 3: Spread the Dressing

Use the foam applicator pad or microfiber towel to spread the tire dressing evenly over the surface of the tire. Make sure to apply a thin, even coat for the best results.

## Step 4: Let the Dressing Dry

Allow the tire dressing to dry completely before driving your vehicle. This will ensure that the dressing does not sling or rub off onto your car's paint or other surfaces.

## Step 5: Repeat as Needed

Gyeon Q2M Tire Express is designed to provide a long-lasting shine and protection for your tires. However, you may need to reapply the dressing every few weeks to maintain the desired level of gloss.
